channel.title: Analytics on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in Analytics on emsenn.net

item.title: Hypertensor analytics Service
item.description:
Hypertensor Analytics Service Architecture

Tracks quasicrystalline hypertensors, their substitution dynamics, and derived measurements (entropy, densities) for downstream planning modules.

Dependencies

  • Quasicrystalline Hypertensor Simulation: supplies lattice window updates, substitution inflations, and quasicrystal checks.
  • Measurement Algebra Simulation: provides observables/integrals to quantify pattern frequencies and energy usage.
  • Measurement Fabric Simulation: distributes hypertensor diagnostics to monitoring/policy consumers.
  • Topology Integration Simulation: interprets placement/strata constraints so hypertensor analytics can inform runtime/storage locality decisions.
  • Traceability & Knowledge Service: records the math backing each analytic report.

Components

  1. Window Manager.
    Maintains simulated lattice windows, applies flow/nucleus operators, and schedules substitution inflations.

item.title: Markov analytics Service
item.description:
Markov Analytics Service Architecture

Provides flow/kernel analytics, stationary distribution insights, and entropy tracking based on the Markov, measurement, and spectral specs.

Dependencies

  • Markov Dynamics Simulation: kernel, entropy, mixing procedures.
  • Measurement Algebra Simulation: expectation/integration for presenting metrics.
  • Spectral Simulation: extracts harmonic bases and spectral projections for observation kernels.
  • Measurement Fabric Simulation: transports analytics telemetry (mixing, entropy drift) to monitoring/resource systems.
  • Traceability & Knowledge Service: ensures every analytic report references the theorems/specs backing it.
  • Topology Integration Simulation: supplies placement/strata context so diagnostics can highlight localized anomalies.

Components

  1. Kernel Inspector.
    Computes stationary distributions, checks detailed balance.
